nodes.label: Diff Viewer Screenshot (GIF)
nodes.description: Animated GIF demonstrating the diff viewer UI feature of dragit. Shows a TypeScript interface (Settings) with inline diff highlighting: removed lines (red/pink with '-' marker) for fileOpenerApp, openLastOnStart, showToasts fields; added lines (green with '+' marker) for fileOpener, openLastFolderOnStart, enableToast fields. A bottom toolbar displays three view mode buttons: 'Before changes', 'Inline changes' (active/selected), and 'After changes'. Dark theme editor aesthetic.

nodes.label: Diff Viewer UI Component
nodes.description: UI feature showing git diffs with three modes: Before changes, Inline changes, After changes.

nodes.label: Settings TypeScript Interface
nodes.description: TypeScript Settings interface shown in diff: fields fileOpenerApp→fileOpener, openLastOnStart→openLastFolderOnStart, showToasts→enableToast renamed/changed across a diff.
